content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.3-codex-spark-xhigh

## Summary

No code-level correctness defects were found in the changed files themselves; however, the diff is limited to ralph-running metadata and does not cover the requested signal/kill-tree implementation change. This is effectively a missing-workgap rather than a defect in modified logic.

## Amendments

1. The working-tree diff contains no application code changes; only workflow metadata updates are present in `.ralph-burning/projects/rlm-4/journal.ndjson` (new entries at lines 23-26) and `.ralph-burning/projects/rlm-4/run.json` (new `stage_resolution_snapshot` block around lines 12-32). Since `src/cli/run.rs` is untouched, this patch does not implement the bead goal around durable SIGTERM/cleanup behavior, so the cleanup bugs remain unchanged.
   Rationale: The scope of this bead is operational correctness under signal/interruption; without touching runtime signal and process-group termination logic, no correctness/safety behavior is changed.
